notes: Dante's six-face die. WILD face gates on Authority banked.

faces.description: Success ★★. The stamp went down crisp.
Success ★. The signature lines up with the line.
Partial. Spend 1 Authority to convert to ★.
Partial. Spend 1 Authority to convert to ★.
Failure. The page is voided. +1 Authority.
Wild. Counts as ★ if you have at least 1 Authority banked; counts as failure otherwise.
